data.name: AllowedFiles
data.value: Only CSV or OFX files are allowed.

data.name: AreYouSureRemoveData
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this data?

data.name: AreYouSureRemoveDataGroup
data.value: All installments related to this transaction will be removed. Are you sure you want to delete the installments?

data.name: ChangeOtherInstallments
data.value: You modified an installment transaction; do you want to modify this value for all other pending installments?

data.name: DateTransactionInfo
data.value: Date on which you made or will make the payment.

data.name: DeleteAllInstallments
data.value: auto_awesome Você quis dizer: Deletar todas as parcelas futuras dessa parcela 48 Delete all future installments of this installment.

data.name: DoYouWantToUseAi
data.value: Do you want to use artificial intelligence to decide the type and category of your transaction?

data.name: DoYouWantToView
data.value: Do you only want to view the attachment and then save it?

data.name: EndDateIsLaterThanStartDate
data.value: The end date cannot be later than the start date.

data.name: EndSession
data.value: Are you sure you want to end the session?

data.name: ExistsAnotherRegister
data.value: There is a record linked to this, so it cannot be deactivated.

data.name: CardInvoiceAlreadyPaid
data.value: The card invoice has already been paid

data.name: CreditLimitExceeded
data.value: The amount exceeds the card limit. Increase the limit to continue.

data.name: InvalidCommitmentPeriod
data.value: The end date cannot be earlier than the start date

data.name: PlanningNoteLowConfidence
data.value: {percent}% of the projected outflow is estimated

data.name: PlanningWarningDecliningBalance
data.value: Your balance drops {amount} over the period

data.name: PlanningWarningLowBuffer
data.value: At the worst month you have only {months} months of expenses saved

data.name: SubtitleCreditCardReport
data.value: Overview of your cards spending, limits and invoices

data.name: ItemNotFound
data.value: No records found. Please register a new one to be able to view it.

data.name: LengthPassword8
data.value: The password must contain at least 8 characters.

data.name: LowercaseLetterPassword
data.value: The password must contain lowercase letter

data.name: MakeLoginForAccessYourAccount
data.value: Make login for access your account

data.name: NotSequencialNumberPassword
data.value: The password cannot coantain sequencial number

data.name: PasswordRules
data.value: The password must contain at least 8 characters, including uppercase letters, lowercase letters, and special characters, and cannot contain sequential numbers.

data.name: RecurringExpenseDesc
data.value: Use this option for expenses that recur every month, such as subscriptions, and do not have a fixed number of installments.

data.name: SaveAttachInvalid
data.value: There are transactions with required fields that are not filled in.

data.name: SelectAtLeastOneItemToBeRemoved
data.value: Select at least one item to be removed.

data.name: SpecialCharacter
data.value: The password must contain special character

data.name: SubtitleComparison
data.value: Compare the financial performance between the two selected months.

data.name: SubtitleExpenseRepot
data.value: Information on all expenses for the selected period

data.name: SubtitleIncomeReport
data.value: Information on all incomes for the selected period

data.name: SubtitleInvestmentReport
data.value: Information on all investmentfor the selected period

data.name: TransactionNotFound
data.value: No transaction found for this period.

data.name: UppercaseLetterPassword
data.value: The password must contain Uppercase letter

data.name: CardInvoiceCategoryHint
data.value: Only one category can be the card invoice payment category. Marking this one automatically unmarks the previous one.

data.name: TooManyAttempts
data.value: Too many attempts. Request a new code

data.name: ResendCooldownActive
data.value: Please wait before requesting a new code

data.name: AccountNotConfirmed
data.value: Confirm your email before logging in

data.name: EmailAlreadyConfirmed
data.value: This email has already been confirmed

data.name: EmailConfirmationBody
data.value: Your confirmation code is {0}. It is valid for 2 minutes.

data.name: PasswordResetBody
data.value: Your password reset code is {0}. It is valid for 2 minutes.

data.name: ConfirmEmailInstructions
data.value: We sent a 6-digit code to your email. Enter it below to confirm your account.

data.name: ForgotPasswordInstructions
data.value: Enter your email to receive a password reset code.

data.name: InvalidRefreshToken
data.value: Invalid session. Please log in again

data.name: RefreshTokenExpired
data.value: Session expired. Please log in again

data.name: InvalidImageFormat
data.value: Invalid image format. Use JPEG, PNG or WebP

data.name: InvalidGoalDate
data.value: Target date must be in the future

data.name: GoalNotActive
data.value: This goal is no longer active

data.name: GoalRetried
data.value: New goal created from the previous attempt

data.name: GoalNotEligibleForRetry
data.value: This goal is still active and cannot be retried

data.name: CategorySpendingSuggestion
data.value: Cutting back on {item} could save you up to $ {amount} per month

data.name: NoSpendingSuggestionAvailable
data.value: No spending recorded in this category yet this month

data.name: NoActiveGoals
data.value: You don't have any active goals yet

data.name: AcceleratesGoalIn
data.value: This could bring your "{goal}" goal forward by {days} days

data.name: NoGoalsInHistory
data.value: No completed or expired goals yet

data.name: NotificationTransactionOverdue
data.value: The transaction "{description}" of {amount} was due on {dueDate} and hasn't been paid yet.

data.name: NotificationTransactionDueToday
data.value: The transaction "{description}" of {amount} is due today.

data.name: NotificationTransactionDueTomorrow
data.value: The transaction "{description}" of {amount} is due tomorrow.

data.name: NotificationCardInvoiceOverdue
data.value: Your card invoice was due on {dueDate} and hasn't been paid yet.

data.name: NotificationCardInvoiceDueReminder
data.value: Your card invoice of {amount} is due on {dueDate}.

data.name: NotificationCategoryBudgetGoalExceeded
data.value: You've exceeded the {monthlyLimit} limit for "{categoryName}" this month.

data.name: NotificationCategoryBudgetGoalNearLimit
data.value: You've used {percentUsed}% of the "{categoryName}" limit this month.

data.name: NotificationFinancialGoalAtRisk
data.value: Your goal "{goalName}" is at risk of missing the {targetDate} deadline.

data.name: NotificationFinancialGoalContributionOverdue
data.value: You haven't logged a contribution to "{goalName}" in {days} days.

data.name: NotificationFinancialGoalNearCompletionReminder
data.value: You're almost there! Just {remainingAmount} left to complete "{goalName}" — log your contribution now.

data.name: NotificationFinancialGoalContributionReminder
data.value: Don't forget to log this month's contribution to "{goalName}".

data.name: NotificationProjectedSpendingPaceExceedsBudget
data.value: At your current pace, you're likely to exceed the "{categoryName}" limit before month's end.

data.name: NotificationProjectedNegativeBalance
data.value: Your projection shows a negative balance starting {month}/{year}.

data.name: NotificationCategorySpendingAboveAverage
data.value: Your spending on "{categoryName}" this month is above your usual average.

data.name: NotificationRecurringExpenseIncreased
data.value: Your recurring expense "{description}" increased from {previousAmount} to {currentAmount}.

data.name: NotificationMonthlySavingsSummary
data.value: You saved {amount} compared to last month.

data.name: NotificationSignificantSpendingIncrease
data.value: Your spending increased {percent}% compared to last month.

data.name: NotificationNetWorthChange
data.value: Your accumulated balance (income - expenses) changed {percent}% compared to last month.

data.name: NotificationCategoryWithoutBudgetGoalHighSpending
data.value: "{categoryName}" had high spending this month and still has no limit set.

data.name: NotificationNoTransactionLoggedRecently
data.value: You haven't logged a transaction in {days} days.

data.name: NotificationEmailPreferencesHint
data.value: You can change this anytime in your profile.

data.name: CriticalNotificationsSubtitle
data.value: Resolve these soon to keep your finances on track

data.name: AssistantRootLowDataMessage
data.value: Hello! I still don't have enough data about your finances to make detailed projections. Let's start by exploring what you can do in KronPay?

data.name: AssistantRootRichDataMessage
data.value: Want a guided tour, or do you already know what you're looking for?

data.name: AssistantGuideMessage
data.value: I can help you check your spending by category, your goal progress, your credit card invoice and your notifications. Choose a topic below or type your question.

data.name: AssistantTransactionsTopicMessage
data.value: What do you want to know about transactions?

data.name: AssistantCategorySearchMessage
data.value: Type the category or subcategory name

data.name: AssistantNoRecentTransactionsAnswer
data.value: You have no transactions logged this month.

data.name: AssistantNoActiveGoalsAnswer
data.value: You have no active goals at the moment.

data.name: AssistantNoCardAnswer
data.value: You have no credit card registered.

data.name: AssistantFallbackMessage
data.value: I didn't understand that. Try choosing one of the options below or rephrase your question.

data.name: AssistantWidgetSubtitle
data.value: How can I help you today?

data.name: AssistantGoalsSelectMessage
data.value: You have {0} active goals. Which one would you like to know more about?

data.name: AssistantGoalDetailAnswer
data.value: Your goal "{0}" is at {1} of {2} ({3}% complete), due by {4}.

data.name: AssistantCardSelectMessage
data.value: You have {0} active cards. Which one would you like to know more about?

data.name: AssistantTopicClarifyMessage
data.value: I'm not sure I understood. Did you mean one of these?

data.name: AssistantNotificationsListMessage
data.value: Here are your most recent notifications. Tap one to mark it as read.

data.name: AssistantMarkAllConfirmMessage
data.value: Are you sure you want to mark all notifications as read?

data.name: AssistantGuideNavigatingMessage
data.value: Let me show you the {0} screen!

data.name: TourDashboardTabsDescription
data.value: Switch between the monthly and annual view of your finances here.

data.name: TourDashboardFilterDescription
data.value: Choose the month and year to see the summary for that specific period.

data.name: TourDashboardChartsDescription
data.value: See the split between income and expenses, and your daily activity for the month.

data.name: TourTransactionsSummaryDescription
data.value: Here you see total expenses, income, investments and the period result.

data.name: TourTransactionsAddDescription
data.value: Click here to record a new expense, income or investment.

data.name: TourTransactionsTableDescription
data.value: All your transactions show up here — you can filter, edit and delete them.

data.name: TourReportTabsDescription
data.value: Choose between expenses, income, investments, comparison or credit card.

data.name: TourReportExportDescription
data.value: Export the current report to PDF to save or share it.

data.name: TourPlanningTabsDescription
data.value: Navigate between the financial projection and other planning resources.

data.name: TourPlanningControlsDescription
data.value: Adjust the month horizon and safety reserve used in the calculation.

data.name: TourPlanningKpisDescription
data.value: See your current balance, projected balance and the first at-risk month, if any.

data.name: TourCreditCardBankDescription
data.value: Select the bank to register a new credit card.

data.name: TourCreditCardTableDescription
data.value: Click a card in the list to edit its details.

data.name: TourGoalsNewButtonDescription
data.value: Create a new financial goal or category budget goal.

data.name: TourGoalsHistoryDescription
data.value: See goals that have already been completed or expired in the history.

data.name: TourGoalsGridDescription
data.value: Track the progress of each active goal and add contributions right here.

data.name: TourConfigFilterDescription
data.value: Filter categories by expense, income or investment.

data.name: TourConfigSearchDescription
data.value: Quickly find a category by name.

data.name: TourConfigAddDescription
data.value: Register a new category, item or payment method.

data.name: BadgeBreakingTheIceDescription
data.value: Chat with the KronPay AI assistant for the first time.

data.name: BadgeExplorerDescription
data.value: Complete the app's guided welcome tour.

data.name: BadgeFutureVisionDescription
data.value: Check your first financial projection in Planning.

data.name: BadgeFirstMissionDescription
data.value: Complete your first mission, of any type.

data.name: BadgeFirstPositiveMonthDescription
data.value: Close a month with more income than expenses.

data.name: BadgeFirstInvoiceOnTimeDescription
data.value: Pay a card invoice on time for the first time.

data.name: BadgeNoPendingAlertsDescription
data.value: Clear all your pending critical alerts.

data.name: BadgeFirstBudgetMetDescription
data.value: Meet a category's budget for the first time.

data.name: BadgeIronDisciplineDescription
data.value: Meet the same category's budget for 6 months in a row.

data.name: BadgeFlawlessQuarterDescription
data.value: Meet the same category's budget for 3 months in a row.

data.name: BadgeSolidReserveDescription
data.value: Keep an emergency reserve for several months in a row.

data.name: BadgeConsistentInvestorDescription
data.value: Invest 20% or more of your income for 3 months in a row.

data.name: BadgeNoLatePaymentsDescription
data.value: Pay a card's invoices on time for 6 months in a row.

data.name: BadgeQuarterInTheBlackDescription
data.value: Close a quarter (3 months in a row) with a positive balance.

data.name: BadgeDiligentPlannerDescription
data.value: Meet your projected financial plan for several months in a row.

data.name: BadgeNoRelapsesDescription
data.value: Go 6 months in a row without exceeding any budget.

data.name: BadgeQuickResponderDescription
data.value: Resolve 5 critical alerts quickly, right after being notified.

data.name: BadgeTrendReverserDescription
data.value: Reverse a rising spending trend 2 times.

data.name: BadgeWideBudgetCoverageDescription
data.value: Set a budget for several expense categories at the same time.

data.name: BadgeRecoveredGoalDescription
data.value: Recover and complete a goal that was behind schedule.

data.name: BadgeSixMonthsFocusedDescription
data.value: Keep a goal active with contributions for 6 months in a row.

data.name: BadgePerfectYearDescription
data.value: Go 12 months in a row without exceeding any budget.

data.name: BadgeRobustReserveDescription
data.value: Keep a robust emergency reserve for a full year.

data.name: BadgeDedicatedInvestorDescription
data.value: Invest 20% or more of your income for 12 months in a row.

data.name: BadgePositiveFiscalYearDescription
data.value: Close a fiscal year (12 months) with a positive balance.

data.name: BadgeIronDisciplineIIIDescription
data.value: Meet the same category's budget for 24 months in a row.

data.name: BadgeGoldenStreakDescription
data.value: Close 6 months in a row with a positive balance.

data.name: BadgeNoLatePaymentsYearDescription
data.value: Pay a card's invoices on time for 12 months in a row.

data.name: BadgePlanningMasterDescription
data.value: Meet your projected financial plan for a full year.

data.name: BadgeResilientDescription
data.value: Recover from a Rank drop and climb back up.

data.name: BadgePlanningLegendDescription
data.value: Keep your planning horizon clear of pending items for 12 months in a row.

data.name: BadgeCompleteCollectionDescription
data.value: Unlock every Bronze and Silver badge.

data.name: AchievementUnlockedSubtitle
data.value: You just earned a new trophy

data.name: AuthShowcaseScene1Subtitle
data.value: Income, expenses, cards and categories in one place.

data.name: AuthShowcaseScene2Subtitle
data.value: Artificial Intelligence organizes everything for you.

data.name: AuthShowcaseScene3Subtitle
data.value: Know if your goals really fit your budget.

data.name: AuthShowcaseScene4Question1
data.value: How much did I spend on food?

data.name: AuthShowcaseScene4Question2
data.value: I want to log an expense

data.name: AuthShowcaseScene6Subtitle
data.value: Notifications at the right time, in any language.
